stemHtml: For which of the following situations is a step climb recommended?

options.a: When flying at the optimum altitude in order to optimise maximum range.
options.b: When flying 2000 ft above the optimum altitude in order to optimise maximum endurance.
options.c: When flying 2000 ft below the optimum altitude in order to optimise maximum range.
options.d: When flying below the optimum altitude in order to optimise maximum endurance.
